headline: 400+ missed calls recovered — fully automated, no staff added

problems.impact: Every unanswered call is a lost booking. Staff couldn't keep up with inbound volume during peak hours.
Team spending 2–3 hours daily on callbacks and appointment reminders — time pulled from actual service delivery.
Calls after 6 PM went to voicemail. Leads went cold overnight and booked competitors by morning.

solutions.title: AI Voice Agent (24/7)
solutions.description: Custom-trained voice agent answers every inbound call, qualifies the lead, and books appointments directly into the calendar — day or night.

solutions.title: CRM Integration & Auto-tagging
solutions.description: Every call logged in GoHighLevel with transcript, lead score, and outcome tag. No manual data entry.

solutions.title: Automated Follow-up Sequences
solutions.description: No-shows and unbooked leads enter a 3-touch SMS + email sequence automatically. Reactivation without lifting a finger.

solutions.title: Live Dashboard
solutions.description: Real-time view of call volume, booking rate, and agent performance. Owner sees the business without being in it.

results.label: per week recovered for the owner

testimonial.quote: I used to dread Monday mornings — a queue of missed calls to work through. Now I open the dashboard and everything's already handled. It feels like I hired someone, except it never sleeps.
testimonial.author: Client Name
